name: SpotLine Enhanced
description:
Display synchronized lyrics with karaoke animation in the top bar.

Features:
* Karaoke sweep effect with customizable colors
* Real-time synced lyrics from NetEase Cloud Music
* Supports any MPRIS-compatible player (Spotify, YouTube Music, browsers, etc.)
* Lyrics caching for instant display on repeated plays
* Smart timing based on lyric timestamps
* Fully customizable: font size, max width, colors, panel position

Based on SpotLine by deosaju.
